entity.label: Shamir
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: A town among the mountains of Judah (Josh. 15:48); probably Somerah, 2 1/2 miles north-west of Debir.

nodes.label: Shamir
nodes.description: A town among the mountains of Judah (Josh. 15:48); probably Somerah, 2 1/2 miles north-west of Debir.

verses.text: And in the mountains, Shamir, and Jattir, and Socoh,
